parameters.query: SELECT * FROM conversation_sessions WHERE whatsapp_number = $1 LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO conversation_sessions (whatsapp_number, current_state, context, last_activity)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3::jsonb, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (whatsapp_number)
DO UPDATE SET current_state = $2, context = $3::jsonb, last_activity = NOW()

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: $json.phone, type: 'text', text: { body: $json.response } }) }}
